title: Harry Leary’s Honda Jersey
collection: Harry’s Room — The Harry Leary Collection
description: A black, red and white Honda / Fox racing jersey attributed to Harry Leary. The supplied post connects the object to his enthusiasm for Honda motorcycles and ATVs.
provenance_summary: Presented as part of the Harry Leary Collection; acquisition detail was not supplied in this source package.
qualifications: The jersey and its branding are visible in the supplied source image.
The source post’s general remark about “Ride Red” stickers is contextual commentary, not used here as authentication evidence.
